name: tweezy_tweet_generator
description: High-impact crypto Twitter content strategist. Generates 3 scroll-stopping tweets (Alpha, Hype, Clean style) for any crypto topic or narrative. Powered by AI, optimized for engagement and virality.

topic.description: The crypto topic, narrative, or idea to generate tweets about

goal.description: Tweet goal: engagement, shill, education, or alpha. Defaults to engagement.

persona.description: Tweet persona: degen, analyst, founder, or whale. Defaults to degen.

token.description: Optional token ticker or name to naturally feature in tweets

key_points.description: Optional key points to incorporate into the tweets

constraints.description: Optional constraints the tweets must follow
